alkylation reagent: Alkylate with 375mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min at room temperature in the dark.
alkylation concentration: Alkylate with 375mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min at room temperature in the dark.
cleavage agent: Digest with mass spectrometry grade trypsin in 50mM ammonium bicarbonate (pH 7.5) for 16 h at 37°C.
enrichment method: we separated EVs from CSF by affinity capture (AC method; MagCapture Exosome Isolation kit)...
fractionation method: the EVs were separated from unfixed frozen human brain tissue using the discontinuous sucrose gradient ultracentrifugation (SG-UC) method.
fragmentation method: data-dependent acquisition selected the top 10 most abundant precursor ions for tandem mass spectrometry by HCD fragmentation...
instrument: into a Thermo Scientific Q Exactive hybrid mass spectrometer.
ionization type: equipped with electrospray ionization (ESI) source and coupled with an Ultimate 3000 high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC).
labeling: the TMT labelled peptides were separated on a C18 reverse-phase capillary column...
reduction reagent: Reduce with 2.5mM dithiothreitol for 1 h at 37°C.
reduction concentration: Reduce with 2.5mM dithiothreitol for 1 h at 37°C.
